By creating this pull-request you are certifying that your
contribution complies with the [Developer's Certificate of
Origin](https://developercertificate.org/).

_It is very unlikely that a contribution created with the help of AI
complies with this requirement._

When merging, would like to use this pull-request's _Subject_ and
_Description_ (i.e., this text) as part of the Merge commit message!
So please be concise with what you write here!

Please be sure to work through through the following:

- our [Programming
  Conventions](https://github.com/libreswan/libreswan/wiki/Hacking:-Programming-Conventions)
  guideline

- our [Git, GitHub, and Pull
  Requests](https://github.com/libreswan/libreswan/wiki/Hacking:-Git,-GitHub,-and-Pull-Requests)
  guideline

_If you're a GSoC candidate then creating a pull-request is not the
best way to initiate contact with the Libreswan community._
